zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne於大約1571年出生在英國英格蘭。她於1591年之前與Richard Browne在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne于大约1571年出生在英国英格兰。她于1591年之前与Richard Browne在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne was born about 1571, in England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Browne before 1591, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne est née environ 1571, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Browne avant 1591, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne wurde um 1571 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat vor 1591 in England, United Kingdom Richard Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne è nata il circa 1571 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Browne prima del 1591, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browneは約1571年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。1591年以前にイギリスイギリスでRichard Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne(은)는 대략 1571년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1591년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne nasceu aproximadamente 1571, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard Browne antes 1591, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne родилась около 1571 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Browne перед 1591 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Browne nació aproximadamente 1571, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard Browne antes de 1591, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
